pi_items.metadata_value: Drosophila Kc167 cells (implied by BBBC007 reference)
pi_items.source: Although the task mentions BBBC007 (Drosophila melanogaster Kc167 cells), the download URLs are invalid. setup_task.sh lines 42-72 show fallback code that generates synthetic data if download fails. Since URLs are 404, synthetic data is always generated: 512x512 pixel images with elliptical nucleus and ring-shaped cytoplasm signal.

pi_items.metadata_value: 512x512 (implied by BBBC007, which has roughly 512x512 pixel images)
pi_items.source: Verified in setup_task.sh line 50: synthetic DAPI image created as np.zeros((512, 512), dtype=np.uint8). This matches BBBC007 spec of roughly 512x512 pixels from https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC007.
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 54, 65: synthetic nucleus is drawn as ellipse from (200,200) to (300,300), creating a ~50x50 pixel circular nucleus in the center of the 512x512 image.

pi_items.verified_value: Otsu thresholding on DAPI channel, morphological dilation with disk(15), XOR operation to create cytoplasm mask, mean intensity measurement on signal channel
pi_items.source: Verified in export_result.sh lines 34-76. Ground truth calculates: (1) Otsu threshold on DAPI, (2) Dilation with disk(15), (3) Cytoplasm = Dilated AND NOT Nucleus, (4) Mean intensity of signal for each region, (5) N/C ratio = nucleus_mean / cytoplasm_mean.
Verified in setup_task.sh line 54: draw_d.ellipse([200, 200, 300, 300], fill=200). Gaussian noise with std=5 is added (line 57).
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 65 and 68: nucleus in signal channel is drawn with fill=100, then overwritten by inner ellipse of same value.
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 67-68: outer ellipse (cytoplasm region) is drawn with fill=180, then inner nucleus region (200,200,300,300) is overwritten with fill=100 to create ring effect.

pi_items.verified_value: Approximately 1.0 (100/180 ≈ 0.56, but noise and morphological operations affect exact value)
pi_items.source: Calculated from synthetic data: nucleus mean signal intensity is 100, cytoplasm mean signal intensity is 180. Theoretical ratio = 100/180 = 0.56. However, actual ratio depends on Otsu threshold and morphological operations in ground truth calculation.

privileged_info_summary: The task claims to use BBBC007 (Drosophila melanogaster Kc167 cells) but actually uses synthetic data. The download URLs for the BBBC007 images (A01_s1_w127027521798F81395E095D4A32514AE.tif and A01_s1_w205C895744F76939C025095318536284.tif) return 404 errors and do not exist on the Broad Institute servers. These filenames do not match the actual BBBC007 archive content. The setup script contains a fallback that generates synthetic 512x512 pixel images with a bright elliptical nucleus (intensity 200) in DAPI and a ring-shaped signal (cytoplasm intensity 180, nucleus intensity 100) when downloads fail, which is always the case. Ground truth is calculated using Otsu thresholding on DAPI, morphological dilation with disk(15), and intensity measurements. All file paths specified in metadata are correct. The enlarge_pixels parameter of 15 is correctly implemented via morphological dilation with disk(15).
